desc: sum() on text column "name" — non-numeric aggregate is a client/422 error, never a 5xx
avg() on text column "name" — non-numeric average rejected cleanly
sum() on the PK text column "id" — text PK cannot be summed
avg() on integer column "n" is a VALID aggregate — must succeed
count(*) with no field — canonical COUNT, must succeed
min() over text column "name" is valid (lexicographic) — succeeds
max() over integer column "n" is valid — succeeds
aggregate func "median" not in AGG_FUNCS enum — 400 validation
aggregate func "stddev" not in AGG_FUNCS enum — 400 validation
aggregate func uppercase "SUM" — enum is case-sensitive, 400
aggregate column missing required "alias" — 400 validation
aggregate with empty aggregates array — AggregateDto requires >=1 logically
insert a fixed id then re-insert SAME id -> first 200/201, this dup insert 409
re-insert the SAME literal id again (idempotent dup) -> 409 unique
insert id then immediately insert same id with different non-key cols -> 409
insert numeric-string id collision candidate '42' -> success or 409 on repeat
insert with same id but cast as integer-looking key -> coerced, dup -> 409
insert UUID-shaped id twice in corpus -> dup 409 on second pass
insert id with surrounding whitespace ' dup-pk-fixed-0001 ' -> distinct or 409
insert empty-string id '' twice -> dup 409 on the second
insert id with unicode 'dup-é-1' twice -> dup 409
insert max-length-ish id (255 chars) twice -> dup 409 or 22001 length 409
upsert NEW key (no row exists) -> behaves as insert -> 200/201
upsert EXISTING key (same as prior) -> behaves as update -> 200/201 rowCount>=1
SQLi value (tautology OR 1=1) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (UNION SELECT) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (stacked DROP TABLE) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (comment-terminated) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (double-dash inline comment) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (hash comment (mysql)) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (block comment) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (nested block comment) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (quote escape backslash) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (double single quote) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (semicolon stacked insert) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
SQLi value (boolean blind AND sleep) in insert data must be escaped/stored, never executed
Body is a bare number, not a JSON object
Leading comma inside object — invalid JSON
Single-quoted keys/values (not valid JSON)
Unquoted key — JS object literal, not JSON
Undefined literal in JSON (invalid)
Duplicate op keys with conflicting values
Only whitespace as body
Unterminated string value in JSON
Extra closing brace after valid object
Two JSON objects concatenated in body
BOM prefix before JSON object
Unknown op value 'fetch'
limit huge int32 max 2147483647 (above Max(500))
limit int64 max 9223372036854775807 (above Max(500))
limit beyond int64 (overflow) 99999999999999999999
limit as float 50.5 must fail IsInt
limit as numeric string "100" (implicit conversion may coerce to valid int)
limit as numeric string out of range "9999"
limit as null (should fall back to default or be ignored)
limit as array [10] (type confusion)
limit as object {} (type confusion)
limit in scientific notation 5e2 (=500, valid edge)
limit in scientific notation 1e10 (huge, out of range)
limit with leading zeros as string "007"
empty JSON object body (no op/action) -> 400 validation
whitespace-only body (spaces) -> 400
whitespace-only body (tabs+newlines) -> 400
single newline body -> 400
JSON false literal as whole body -> 400
bare number 0 as whole body -> 400
bare quoted string as whole body -> 400
JSON empty array as whole body -> 400 (object expected)
object with only unknown junk key -> 400 forbidNonWhitelisted
object with only whitespace key name -> 400
trailing data after valid JSON -> 400 parse
unescaped control char in string -> 400 parse
insert with client owner_id=foreign principal in data — must be stripped, write succeeds owner-scoped
insert with owner_id=foreign tenant string in data — stripped, no foreign owner echoed
insert with owner_id=foreign user string — stripped
insert with owner_id=empty string — stripped, trusted value wins
insert with owner_id=null — stripped, not honored as NULL owner
insert with owner_id=numeric 0 — stripped (type-confusion attempt)
insert with owner_id=boolean true — stripped
insert with owner_id as nested object — stripped, no crash
insert with owner_id as array — stripped, no crash
insert with owner_id whitespace-padded foreign value — stripped (no trim-bypass)
insert with OWNER_ID uppercase key — non-canonical, reaches DB as unknown col => 4xx not honored
insert with Owner_Id mixed case key — non-canonical column => 4xx not cross-tenant
insert numeric string into integer column coerces to int
insert true integer into integer column
insert non-numeric string into integer column rejected (not 500)
insert float string into integer column
insert boolean true into text column coerces or rejects safely
insert string 'true' into boolean-like value
insert integer 1 where boolean expected
insert explicit null into a column (nullable behavior)
insert date as ISO-8601 string into datetime
insert date-only string into datetime
insert epoch integer into date column
insert malformed date string into datetime rejected safely
insert emoji value (simple emoji U+1F600) round-trips
insert emoji value (emoji with variation selector heart) round-trips
insert emoji value (ZWJ family sequence) round-trips
insert emoji value (skin-tone modifier wave) round-trips
insert emoji value (regional-indicator flag FR) round-trips
insert emoji value (keycap digit sequence) round-trips
insert emoji value (rainbow flag ZWJ) round-trips
insert emoji value (professional ZWJ woman-scientist) round-trips
insert emoji value (100 string of mixed emoji) round-trips
insert emoji value (emoji-only column value) round-trips
list filter on emoji-valued column returns clean rows array
upsert with emoji value is idempotent-safe
